description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:6 Docker image with a global before_script that runs npm install --silent. Define two stages, test and deploy. In the test stage add a testing job that runs npm run unit. In the deploy stage add an npm-publish job (allow_failure) that runs npm run build, then echo "//registry.npmjs.org/:_authToken=${NPM_TOKEN}" > ~/.npmrc, then npm publish and rm ~/.npmrc, and configure it to run only on the master branch and deploy to an environment named "npm package" with URL https://www.npmjs.com/package/vue-gitlab-api. Also in the deploy stage add a pages job that runs ./node_modules/.bin/jsdoc src/GitLabAPI.js, moves the out directory to public, publishes the public/ directory as a pages artifact, runs only on master, and sets an environment "JSDoc API Documentation" with URL https://clorichel.gitlab.io/vue-gitlab-api/.
